title: M22-4, Part II, Chapter 3, Section H – Benefits Manager Letters
description: This part discusses how non-chapter 33 education benefits, Montgomery GI Bill (MGIB or chapter 30), Montgomery GI Bill - Selected Reserve (MGIB-SR or chapter 1606), and Dependents Educational Assistance (DEA or chapter 35) letters are handled in the Benefits Manager (BM) system.

heading_outline.text: M22-4, Part II, Chapter 3, Section H – Benefits Manager Letters
